description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, angular chassis with a flatbed rear section and a cab positioned toward the front. The vehicle is equipped with six large, rugged wheels, each designed for enhanced traction on uneven surfaces. The body is primarily constructed from metallic panels with a geometric, reinforced pattern, suggesting durability and off-road capability. Visible components include a side-mounted cylindrical tank, external piping, and various mechanical elements, indicating a utilitarian design. The cab has small, reinforced windows and appears to be armored, while the rear flatbed offers ample space for cargo or equipment. The overall appearance is utilitarian and industrial, suitable for challenging urban or off-road environments.
description: A heavy-duty, six-wheeled all-terrain vehicle with a reinforced flatbed and armored cab, designed for rugged urban or off-road use. Its metallic, angular body and robust wheels emphasize durability and utility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced cab, angular hood, and the wide, flat front bumper with visible wheel wells.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the six large wheels, side-mounted tank, and the full length of the flatbed and cab.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the flatbed's structure, rear wheels, and the back of the cab, with visible undercarriage details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the wheels, flatbed, and additional mechanical components on the side.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves, designed for optimal grip on both paved and unpaved surfaces.
